title: trifolium radicosum
intro: Trifolium radicosum, also known as the creeping clover or white clover, is a perennial legume plant that belongs to the Trifolium genus. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Trifolium radicosum include its potential to reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease, improve digestion, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used fresh in salads and as a natural dye.
